items.title: Journal Manuscript Platform
items.description: NSP Journal Manuscript Platform provides manuscript tracking services for journal contributors and offers article management services for editors.

items.title: Journal Partnership
items.description: NSP is an open platform that welcomes universities, research institutes, and scholars to create or deposit your journals. We will provide first-class open online publishing services.

items.title: Conference Paper Platform
items.description: NSP Conference Paper Platform aims to provide efficient and high-quality system for international conference organizers and participants.

items.title: Conference Collaboration
items.description: As an open communication platform, we welcome universities, research institutes, and scholars to establish your conference through the platform. We will provide a free conference submission system and excellent conference publishing services.
